name: XGBoost Classifier
description: XGBoost is a high-performance gradient boosting algorithm designed for scalable and efficient classification tasks, supporting both binary and multi-class problems.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and performs XGBoost Classification
output: The XGBoost Model generated is passed along to the next nodes. The input DataFrame is also passed along to the next nodes

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing all input features used by the XGBoost model to learn classification patterns.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column representing the class or category that the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Name of the column where predicted class probabilities or labels are written after scoring.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls how the dataset is divided between training and validation to evaluate model performance.

fields.name: numClass
fields.title: Num Class
fields.description: Specifies the total number of distinct classes in the classification problem.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Limits the maximum depth of each decision tree, controlling model complexity and overfitting.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins used for discretizing continuous features during split evaluation.

fields.name: maxLeaves
fields.title: Max Leaves
fields.description: Maximum number of leaf nodes allowed in each tree when using leaf-wise growth strategies.

fields.name: numRound
fields.title: Num Round
fields.description: Total number of boosting iterations used to build the ensemble.

fields.name: numWorkers
fields.title: Num Workers
fields.description: Number of parallel workers used for distributed training.

fields.name: objective
fields.title: Objective
fields.description: Defines the learning objective that determines how predictions are computed.

fields.name: eta
fields.title: Eta
fields.description: Learning rate controlling how much each tree contributes to the final model.

fields.name: regLambda
fields.title: Reg Lambda
fields.description: L2 regularization term that helps reduce model complexity and prevent overfitting.

fields.name: regAlpha
fields.title: Reg Alpha
fields.description: L1 regularization term that encourages sparsity in model weights.

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Sub Aample
fields.description: Fraction of training data sampled for each boosting round to improve generalization.

fields.name: sampleType
fields.title: Sample Type
fields.description: Specifies how rows are sampled during training to balance speed and accuracy.

fields.name: treeMethod
fields.title: Tree Method
fields.description: Defines the algorithm used to construct decision trees.

fields.name: useExternalMemory
fields.title: Use External Memory
fields.description: Enables disk-based training for extremely large datasets that exceed memory limits.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to ensure reproducible model training.

fields.name: baseScore
fields.title: Base Score
fields.description: Initial prediction score applied before any boosting iterations.

fields.name: minChildWeight
fields.title: Min Child Weight
fields.description: Minimum sum of instance weights required in a child node to allow a split.

fields.name: colsampleBylevel
fields.title: Col Sample By Level
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled at each tree level to reduce correlation between trees.

fields.name: colsampleBytree
fields.title: Col Sample By Tree
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled for each tree to increase model diversity.

fields.name: minSplitLoss
fields.title: Min Split Loss
fields.description: Minimum loss reduction required to make a split, controlling tree growth aggressiveness.

fields.name: maxDeltaStep
fields.title: Max Delta Step
fields.description: Maximum step size allowed for weight updates to stabilize optimization.

fields.name: sketchEps
fields.title: Sketch Eps
fields.description: Accuracy parameter for approximate histogram construction.

fields.name: scalePosWeight
fields.title: Scale Pos Weight
fields.description: Balances positive and negative classes in imbalanced classification problems.

fields.name: growPlicy
fields.title: Grow Policy
fields.description: Controls whether trees grow level-wise or leaf-wise.

fields.name: normalizeType
fields.title: Normalize Type
fields.description: Specifies normalization strategy applied across trees or the entire forest.

fields.name: skipDrop
fields.title: Skip Drop
fields.description: Probability of skipping trees during training to reduce overfitting.

fields.name: rateDrop
fields.title: Rate Drop
fields.description: Dropout rate applied during boosting iterations for regularization.
